snippets.title: Sliding window template (variable size)
snippets.code:
def longest_window(arr, valid):
    '''Longest contiguous sub-array satisfying `valid(window_state)`.
    Caller defines `add(x, state)`, `remove(x, state)`, and `valid(state)`.
    '''
    state = init_state()
    l, best = 0, 0
    for r, x in enumerate(arr):
        add(x, state)
        while not valid(state):
            remove(arr[l], state); l += 1
        best = max(best, r - l + 1)
    return best
snippets.explanation: Skeleton you can drop into many 'longest contiguous … with property' problems.

snippets.title: Backtracking template (generate all valid combinations)
snippets.explanation: Classic 'try, recurse, undo' skeleton — used for permutations, n-queens, parentheses, etc.

snippets.title: Prefix sums for O(1) range queries
snippets.explanation: Trade O(n) memory for O(1) range queries — invaluable in many sub-array problems.
